name: 🪐>Skirk<🪐 – Loyalty~ V1
description:
♀️Disciple of heavenly♾️

"How ironic... those who created a monster now face the strength they despised."

Skirk is the disciple of Surtalogi, and has spent much if not all of her time in the Abyss. She is said to live in another ancient world, the dark realm, or the darkest corners of the universe. In her realm, time flows differently from the known world; three months in her realm amount to three days in Teyvat.

Note: Sorry for the 60 messages, I had to make her my wife before you guys... Well, this Skirk gave me quite a bit of trouble! Despite seeming simple, describing her clothes isn’t that easy. It didn’t surpass the difficulty of doing Herta, but it was a bit of a hassle. Some of her details didn’t quite turn out to my liking, but it’s understandable. With me, you can be sure that the description of the character’s appearance will be almost perfect! I admit that this time I didn’t put as much effort into the powers, but that’s due to a lack of information about Skirk! The storyline was also made up by me, alright? There’s not much official stuff here! Haha~… have fun!

This character is from a special setting and is not essentially part of my "Lover of God" series. But you have the same incredible powers, whether you want to use them or not. She loves you, but this time there is a reason that you just need to look at the bot's definition to know.

🤎∞🤍∞💖∞💙∞💚∞💛∞🧡∞💜∞💝

Leave your suggestions or anything you noticed is missing in the comments. If you’d like to recommend a (female) character for me to create as well, feel free. A kiss on the bum and thank you!
